content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears well-positioned on the track heading into a right-hand bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 53, target = 53 + 5 = 58
- Waypoint 58: (4.16035795211792, 3.2856805324554443)
- Car position: (4.830732511045926, 2.922023231139473)
- Bearing = atan2(3.2856 - 2.9220, 4.1604 - 4.8307) = atan2(0.3637, -0.6703)
- = 180 - atan2(0.3637, 0.6703) = 180 - 28.47° = 151.53°
- Current heading: 145.81°
- Delta = 151.53 - 145.81 = +5.72° → slight left

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to waypoint 58 is +5.72° (slight left), which is in the 5-15° range so applying small positive steering to stay on the waypoint line.",

    "Track has a long straight section heading ~145-155° (west-southwest) along y≈2.77-2.85",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-65, delta typically -5 to +10° in this zone",
    "Car is consistently near center — good positioning maintained",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — staying near center is optimal here",
    "Heading is ~145° (west-southwest), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Waypoints 58-65 show increasing right curve (south), will need -5 to -15 steering soon",
    "Car is slightly right of center (is_left_of_center=false) but within safe margin",
    "Delta near +5-6° means gentle left correction needed — use steering_angle=2.5 to avoid overshoot"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.0397, 4.9773, 4.9055, 4.8307],
    "y": [2.7283, 2.7830, 2.8496, 2.9220],
    "yaw": [163.103, 156.493, 150.264, 145.808]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 5.72,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 2.5
}
```
